location: Rare (~4%) drop from shield-wielding Godrick Knights. The easiest single target is the spear-wielding Godrick Knight patrolling Gatefront Ruins in Limgrave.
tactics: Gatefront Ruins sits just northeast of the Church of Elleh, right at the Gatefront grace where you first meet Melina — the Godrick Knight patrols there with a squad of lesser Godrick Soldiers.
An alternate farm spot is the Godrick Soldier camp between Warmaster's Shack and Deathtouched Catacombs in Weeping Peninsula, which has two more shield-carrying Godrick Knights.
The knight's spear thrusts are slow and telegraphed — punish after a whiff rather than trading hits.
lore: A metal greatshield coated in gold, carried by knights loyal to Godrick the Grafted — its faint red tinge said to come from the same primordial matter that gave rise to the Erdtree, a mark of longing for a lost home.

builds.name: Earliest 100% block Strength tank
builds.why: One of the first fully physical-blocking greatshields reachable in the game, making it a popular early pick for a Strength-focused turtle build straight out of Limgrave.
